objective: Evaluate the actual social impact of CSR programs, government schemes, and community interventions; verify fund utilisation, beneficiary reach, and stakeholder outcomes against declared objectives.

phases.name: Engagement Setup And CSR Policy Review

steps.action: Review CSR policy, board-approved activities, Section 135 applicability, and implementation structure.
Define sampling strategy: select programs for field-level beneficiary verification and fund tracing.
Trace CSR fund flow from company to implementing agencies to end use — verify bank transfers, utilisation certificates, and receipts.
Conduct beneficiary verification: compare registered beneficiary list to actual recipients via direct interviews, records, and community meetings.
Assess program outcomes: compare declared targets (reach, deliverables) vs. actual outcomes; test quality of services/assets delivered.
Test compliance with scheduled activities, timelines, and procurement processes of implementing agencies.
Prepare stakeholder workshop or community hearing: present preliminary findings, gather community feedback and grievances.
Compile final social audit report: fund utilisation summary, outcome vs. target, key findings, and improvement recommendations.
Ensure CSR audit report is disclosed in Annual Report and filed with MCA under Schedule VII / Section 135 requirements.
Archive all field evidence, beneficiary records, and working papers with immutable hash anchor.

evidence_checklist.description: Board CSR resolution and policy document
Beneficiary registers and field verification records
Program deliverable tracking and milestone records

test_scripts.name: Fund Flow Trace
steps: Agree each payment to board CSR approval and program budget.
Verify bank transfer to implementing agency and utilisation certificate.
Trace a sample to end-use invoices or asset creation at beneficiary level.
Flag un-utilised or diverted funds for escalation.
test_scripts.pass_condition: 100% of CSR funds traced to approved programs with supported utilisation.

test_scripts.name: Beneficiary Reach Verification
test_scripts.sample_rule: Systematic random sample, minimum 10% of total beneficiary list
steps: Select beneficiary sample from official register.
Conduct direct interviews or home visits to confirm benefit receipt.
Cross-check against alternative data sources (attendance, ration, records).
Calculate verified reach rate vs. declared reach.
test_scripts.pass_condition: Verified reach rate matches declared reach within 5% tolerance.

test_scripts.name: Outcome vs. Target Testing
steps: Extract declared targets from CSR plan.
Obtain actual outcome data from implementing agency MIS.
Compute target achievement ratio per program.
Identify programs below 80% target achievement for deep-dive.
test_scripts.pass_condition: All material programs achieve >= 80% of declared targets or have documented remediation plan.

report_sections.title: CSR Program Inventory And Policy Review

closure_gates.criteria: Board CSR approval and program scope confirmed.
Fund flow fully traced and utilisation verified.
